# netbox_route_target (Data Source)

Fetches a route target from NetBox by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the route target to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the route target.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the route target.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with this route target.
